name: Mentha Arvensis | Indications, Pharmacology, Dosage, Side Effects & other Generic info with Available Brand names in Bangladesh
indications: This in indicated in flatulence, stomach ache, vomiting, nausea, diarrhea & indigestion.
pharmacology: This is a unique combination of Peppermint (Mentha arvensis). It acts as a stomachic, digestive, anti-emetic, anti-spasmodic and carminative. Arq Poodina increases appetite, relieves diarrhoea & vomiting. It relaxes the muscles of the digestive tract & relieves colon spasm.
dosage__administration: 3-5 teaspoonfuls (15-25 ml) 2 times daily after meal or as prescribed by the registered physician.
side_effects: No significant side effect has been observed in therapeutic dosage.
storage_conditions: Keep out of reach of children. Store in a cool and dry place away from light.
